spec_match.rationale: The demo fully captures the spec by implementing dynamic card container narrowing, min/max bounds, and text-fit modes.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive with tab controls, columns slider, custom headline text input, and min/max font size boundary sliders.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The index page description matches the card grid demo's features and layout completely.

edge_cases.rationale: The editable text field and dynamic grid column options let users thoroughly stress-test long vs short text scaling limits.

references.rationale: The parent index page contains the required ChromeStatus reference link, though adding a direct reference link to the concept page itself would be useful.

design_system.rationale: Perfect conformance with CSS variables, standard UI colors, responsive alignment, and proper button styling.

openQuestions.title: Add references section with direct ChromeStatus link
openQuestions.detail: While the parent index page includes the chromestatus.com reference, the card-grid concept page itself is missing a 'references' or 'see also' section. Adding a direct link to the ChromeStatus entry will make the page self-contained and improve spec-referencing conformance.

summary: An excellent, highly interactive demo showing real-world card grid scaling using CSS text-fit. Users can dynamically change text, grid columns, bounds, and modes to stress-test the behavior. Conforms to all rules, with only a minor suggestion to add a direct spec/ChromeStatus link directly to this concept page.
